rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Elec. Code §251.033, which governs ethics commission notification of filing deadlines. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 251.033. NOTIFICATION OF DEADLINE FOR FILING REPORTS.
_note: Rule text concerns election code filing-deadline notifications; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
